Package com.example.service.Impl

Class AuthServiceImpl

com.example.service.Impl.AuthServiceImpl

    • setSecurityContextBefore

    • login

      public AuthResponseDTO login(AuthRequestDTO requestDTO)
      Description copied from interface: IAuthService
      Authenticates a user based on the provided credentials.
      Specified by:
      login in interface IAuthService
      Parameters:
      requestDTO - The authentication request containing user credentials - must not be null.
      Returns:
      The authentication response containing the token.

    • register

      public AuthResponseDTO register(AuthRequestDTO requestDTO)
      Description copied from interface: IAuthService
      Registers a new user in the system.

      In this method should be verifying that no existing user has the same email by calling the appropriate validation method. If a user with the given email already exists, an exception must be thrown within this method.

      Specified by:
      register in interface IAuthService
      Parameters:
      requestDTO - The registration request containing user details - must not be null.
      Returns:
      The authentication response containing the token.

      loadUserByUsername in interface org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetailsService
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UsernameNotFoundException
